title: Decarbonization and Global Value Chains in ASEAN

summary.about: The economic and value-chain consequences of ASEAN countries meeting emissions targets.
summary.audience: ASEAN climate, energy, trade and industrial policymakers.
summary.method: Links GTAP-E-Power and GTAP value-added models under business-as-usual and national-target scenarios.
summary.insights: Meeting targets imposes GDP and value-added costs, but estimated social savings from lower carbon emissions can outweigh those losses.
